category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Pakistan PSQCA marking, PS/IEC safety, and NEECA energy-efficiency requirements.

title.en: China-to-Pakistan Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入巴基斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入巴基斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Pakistan's PSQCA conformity marking, PS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety adoption, NEECA energy-efficiency label and MEPS, and R-600a refrigerant requirements for imports through Karachi and Port Qasim.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与巴基斯坦PSQCA合格标识、PS/IEC 60335-2-24安全采标、NEECA能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）、R-600a制冷剂要求（经卡拉奇和卡西姆港进口）差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與巴基斯坦PSQCA合格標識、PS/IEC 60335-2-24安全採標、NEECA能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）、R-600a製冷劑要求（經卡拉奇和卡西姆港進口）差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Pakistan legislation, PSQCA conformity-assessment lists, adopted PS/IEC standards, NEECA energy-efficiency thresholds, and import documentation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴基斯坦法律、PSQCA合格评定清单、采用的PS/IEC标准、NEECA能效门槛值及进口文件要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴基斯坦法律、PSQCA合格評定清單、採用的PS/IEC標準、NEECA能效門檻值及進口文件要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four main Pakistan compliance gaps: (1) PSQCA conformity marking — for items under PSQCA's Conformity Assessment list, a PS Mark/import conformity certificate is required and the relevant PS standard (which adopts IEC 60335-2-24) must be met; Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted as equivalent; (2) NEECA energy-efficiency label and MEPS — refrigerators must meet Pakistan's minimum energy performance standards and carry the NEECA energy label; Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades are not directly transferable; (3) an in-country importer of record handling PSQCA clearance and customs at Karachi/Port Qasim is required, since Chinese exporters cannot self-clear; (4) R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned, but charge documentation against the adopted PS/IEC 60335-2-24 must be confirmed. Pakistan's grid is 230 V / 50 Hz (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). Pakistan has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime for refrigerators.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四项主要的巴基斯坦合规差距：（1）PSQCA合格标识——对于列入PSQCA合格评定清单的产品，须取得PS标志/进口合格证书，并符合相关PS标准（该标准采用IEC 60335-2-24）；中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受为等效证明；（2）NEECA能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）——电冰箱须满足巴基斯坦最低能效性能标准并附贴NEECA能效标签；中国GB 12021.2能效等级不可直接转换；（3）须有处理PSQCA清关及卡拉奇/卡西姆港海关事务的在地进口记录人，因中国出口商无法自行清关；（4）R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须确认充注量文件符合所采用的PS/IEC 60335-2-24。巴基斯坦电网为230 V / 50 Hz（50 Hz与中国一致；标称电压与中国220/380 V不同）。巴基斯坦对电冰箱没有欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或室外噪声法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四項主要的巴基斯坦合規差距：（1）PSQCA合格標識——對於列入PSQCA合格評定清單的產品，須取得PS標誌/進口合格證書，並符合相關PS標準（該標準採用IEC 60335-2-24）；中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受為等效證明；（2）NEECA能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）——電冰箱須滿足巴基斯坦最低能效性能標準並附貼NEECA能效標籤；中國GB 12021.2能效等級不可直接轉換；（3）須有處理PSQCA清關及卡拉奇/卡西姆港海關事務的在地進口記錄人，因中國出口商無法自行清關；（4）R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須確認充注量文件符合所採用的PS/IEC 60335-2-24。巴基斯坦電網為230 V / 50 Hz（50 Hz與中國一致；標稱電壓與中國220/380 V不同）。巴基斯坦對電冰箱沒有歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或室外噪聲法規。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon notified change to PSQCA conformity-assessment lists, adopted PS/IEC standards, or NEECA energy-efficiency thresholds
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
